examples: His supporters have reacted to the news with elation.
Her moods oscillated between depression and elation.
There was no elation in his gait, which kept pace with the action of his sombre mind.
Rumours that China's sovereign-wealth fund was keen on the Tokyo stockmarket provided momentary elation, too.
With a kind of manic elation, he was murmuring what sounded like You like me!
